import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn flush(_ cur: String, _ sum: Int, _ count: Int) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(cur)
    [sum, count]
  else
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      [sum + v, count + 1]
    when None
      [sum, count]
    end
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      let r = flush(cur, sum, count)
      match r.get(0)
      when Some(s)
        sum = s
      when None
        ()
      end
      match r.get(1)
      when Some(c)
        count = c
      when None
        ()
      end
      cur = ""
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
let r = flush(cur, sum, count)
match r.get(0)
when Some(s)
  sum = s
when None
  ()
end
match r.get(1)
when Some(c)
  count = c
when None
  ()
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
